DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATHLEEN M. LUCAS OF THE LUCAS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 402-0200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSHUA MATES OF COOLEY LLP, TEL. NO. 693-2084 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT NSCALED INCORPORATED;
ATTY. YOSEF PERETZ OF PERETZ & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 732-3777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS PETER LOUKIANOFF AND RUPEN DOLASIA.

RULING - JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE AND MS. LUCAS ARE MEMBERS OF INN OF COURT
AND DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR HER RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT NSCALED INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff has stated facts sufficient to state a cause of action for the first, second, third and fifth causes of action. Defendant NSCALED, Inc. raises questions of fact that are not amenable to resolution on a demurrer. The requests for judicial notice are denied. Defendant to respond on the First Amended Complaint by December 7, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATHLEEN M. LUCAS OF THE LUCAS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 402-0200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSHUA MATES OF COOLEY LLP, TEL. NO. 693-2084 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT NSCALED INCORPORATED;
ATTY. YOSEF PERETZ OF PERETZ & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 732-3777 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS PETER LOUKIANOFF AND RUPEN DOLASIA.

RULING - JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSED THAT SHE AND MS. LUCAS ARE MEMBERS OF INN OF COURT
AND DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR HER RECUSAL. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PETER LOUKIANOFF and RUPEN DOLASIA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the second cause of action for fraud and sustained, without leave to amend, as to the fourth cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty. Defendants Loukianoff and Dolasia raise questions of fact that are not amenable to resolution on a demurrer. Plaintiff has withdrawn his fourth cause of action. The pleadings are not uncertain. The request for judicial notice is denied. Defendants to respond on the First Amended Complaint by December 7, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM
